mapper.sql: warehouse_code , warehouse_type, warehouse_name, province, city, district, adress, post_code, linkman, mail, customer_no, customer_linkman, customer_phone, customer_mail, smc_linkman, smc_phone, smc_mail, link_phone, link_mobile, rcv_linkman, rcv_link_tel, rcv_link_email, disable_flag, assembly_flag, centralize_flag, autodispatch_flag, purchase_flag, parent_code, dept_no, max_eamount, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, english_address, english_linkman, returnable_flag, transfer_flag, prestock_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_warehouse
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_warehouse (warehouse_code, warehouse_type, warehouse_name, province, city, district, adress, post_code, linkman, mail, customer_no, customer_linkman, customer_phone, customer_mail, smc_linkman, smc_phone, smc_mail, link_phone, link_mobile, rcv_linkman, rcv_link_tel, rcv_link_email, disable_flag, assembly_flag, centralize_flag, autodispatch_flag, purchase_flag, parent_code, dept_no, max_eamount, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, english_address, english_linkman, returnable_flag, transfer_flag, prestock_flag) values (#{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smcLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{smcPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smcMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcvLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{rcvLinkTel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{rcvLinkEmail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{disableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{assemblyFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{centralizeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{autodispatchFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{purchaseFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{parentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxEamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{delflag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{returnableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{transferFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{prestockFlag,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into dbo.ops_warehouse
warehouse_code,
warehouse_type,
warehouse_name,
province,
city,
district,
adress,
post_code,
linkman,
mail,
customer_no,
customer_linkman,
customer_phone,
customer_mail,
smc_linkman,
smc_phone,
smc_mail,
link_phone,
link_mobile,
rcv_linkman,
rcv_link_tel,
rcv_link_email,
disable_flag,
assembly_flag,
centralize_flag,
autodispatch_flag,
purchase_flag,
parent_code,
dept_no,
max_eamount,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
english_address,
english_linkman,
returnable_flag,
transfer_flag,
prestock_flag,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_warehouse
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_type = #{record.warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{record.district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adress = #{record.adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
post_code = #{record.postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkman = #{record.linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
mail = #{record.mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_linkman = #{record.customerLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
customer_phone = #{record.customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_mail = #{record.customerMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
smc_linkman = #{record.smcLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
smc_phone = #{record.smcPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
smc_mail = #{record.smcMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_phone = #{record.linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_mobile = #{record.linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rcv_linkman = #{record.rcvLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rcv_link_tel = #{record.rcvLinkTel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rcv_link_email = #{record.rcvLinkEmail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
disable_flag = #{record.disableFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
assembly_flag = #{record.assemblyFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
centralize_flag = #{record.centralizeFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
autodispatch_flag = #{record.autodispatchFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
purchase_flag = #{record.purchaseFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
parent_code = #{record.parentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
max_eamount = #{record.maxEamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=BIT},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
english_address = #{record.englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
english_linkman = #{record.englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
returnable_flag = #{record.returnableFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
transfer_flag = #{record.transferFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
prestock_flag = #{record.prestockFlag,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.ops_warehouse set warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_type = #{record.warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = update dbo.ops_warehouse
warehouse_type = #{warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adress = #{adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
post_code = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkman = #{linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
mail = #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_linkman = #{customerLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
customer_phone = #{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_mail = #{customerMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
smc_linkman = #{smcLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
smc_phone = #{smcPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
smc_mail = #{smcMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_phone = #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_mobile = #{linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rcv_linkman = #{rcvLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rcv_link_tel = #{rcvLinkTel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rcv_link_email = #{rcvLinkEmail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
disable_flag = #{disableFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
assembly_flag = #{assemblyFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
centralize_flag = #{centralizeFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
autodispatch_flag = #{autodispatchFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
purchase_flag = #{purchaseFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
parent_code = #{parentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
max_eamount = #{maxEamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=BIT},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
english_address = #{englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
english_linkman = #{englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
returnable_flag = #{returnableFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
transfer_flag = #{transferFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
prestock_flag = #{prestockFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
where warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_warehouse set warehouse_type = #{warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adress = #{adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, post_code = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, linkman = #{linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, mail = #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_linkman = #{customerLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, customer_phone = #{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_mail = #{customerMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, smc_linkman = #{smcLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, smc_phone = #{smcPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, smc_mail = #{smcMail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link_phone = #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link_mobile = #{linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rcv_linkman = #{rcvLinkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rcv_link_tel = #{rcvLinkTel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rcv_link_email = #{rcvLinkEmail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, disable_flag = #{disableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, assembly_flag = #{assemblyFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, centralize_flag = #{centralizeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, autodispatch_flag = #{autodispatchFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, purchase_flag = #{purchaseFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, parent_code = #{parentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_eamount = #{maxEamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=BIT}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, english_address = #{englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, english_linkman = #{englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, returnable_flag = #{returnableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, transfer_flag = #{transferFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, prestock_flag = #{prestockFlag,jdbcType=BIT} where warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
